equivalence_argument: Only partial support was found: FHE field-10 deadline extraction and a raw field-11 delivery config decoder exist, but the reachable builder/verifier delivery path rejects FHE as unsupported before delivery settlement creation or verification.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing reachable FHE Phase 2 delivery settlement support that uses field-10 deadline and field-11-through-16 callback config in both builder and verifier.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/transaction-pool/src/pool/async_pool.rs reads FHE max_poll_block from field index 10.

crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs contains FHE_PRECOMPILE => decode_delivery_config_at(input, 11), but prepare_delivery_settlement_transaction calls ensure_supported_two_phase_metadata first.
is_supported_two_phase_precompile allows long-running HTTP, ZK, sovereign-agent, and persistent-agent only; FHE is excluded.
crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs has the same supported-two-phase guard and tests rejecting IMAGE/AUDIO/VIDEO/FHE families.
No audited repo contains DeliveryConfig::from_fhe_abi; that name appears only in the non-audited legacy checkout.

rationale: The diff documents that FHE has dynamic fields where field 6 is an ABI tail pointer, adds tests proving FHE reads field 10 while non-FHE still reads field 6, and adds an FHE-specific DeliveryConfig decoder used by payload building and wallet verification. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: For FHE precompile input, Phase 2 deadline extraction must read max_inference_block from field 10 at byte offset 320 with a 352-byte minimum, not field 6 at byte offset 192, and delivery callback config must be decoded from the FHE ABI fields 11 through 16.
suggested_falsification_tests: Encode an FHE request with field 6 set to 9999 and field 10 set to 5000 and assert verifier and async pool deadline extraction return 5000; encode a non-FHE request with field 6 set and field 10 different and assert it returns field 6; assert FHE delivery config decodes target, selector, gas limit, fee caps, and value from fields 11-16.
summary: FHE delivery ABI handling is not fully reachable in the audited port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Submit an FHE two-phase job with field 10 and fields 11-16 populated; current local builder/verifier should reject FHE as unsupported before creating/verifying a delivery settlement.
title: FHE delivery ABI uses field 10 deadline and FHE delivery config
